prompt:
Create a polished 16:10 hero visual for the Sui Overflow 2026 hackathon project "DeepBook Risk Console".
Track: DeepBook.
Product concept: A wallet-connected DeepBookV3 risk console that turns price predictions and LP guardrails into tiny guarded testnet maker orders with on-chain receipts.
Visual style: premium product UI mockup, clean Sui-native blockchain dashboard, refined typography, credible fintech/AI infrastructure aesthetic.
Composition: large readable product title, one central app interface or workflow visualization, three compact metric modules, no stock-photo people, no watermarks.
Constraints: English only, avoid fake brand logos, avoid clutter, make the image suitable for a hackathon demo landing page and video cover.
